prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "8. Financial Statements and Supplementary Data" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 9. Changes in and Disagreements with Accountants on Accounting and Financial Disclosure".
Locate the bottom edge of Item 8's text on the page.
- If the "Item 9" heading is visible on this page, then Item 8 ends on the line directly ABOVE that heading.
- Otherwise, Item 8 continues to the bottom of the page.
Then transcribe VERBATIM the LAST 5 lines of Item 8 immediately before it ends. These must be the FINAL lines right before the section ends, NOT lines from the top or middle of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
During the years ended December 31, 2022 and 2021, we recorded $204 million and $101 million, respectively, of impairment losses on
digital assets. During the years ended December 31, 2022 and 2021 we also realized gains of $64 million and $128 million, respectively, in
connection with converting our holdings of digital assets into fiat currency. We also recorded other expenses of $36 million during the second quarter
of the year ended December 31, 2022, related to employee terminations.
